policy_intent: Preserve evaluation credibility by keeping only traceable phenotype labels and by separating ambiguous or inferred rows from benchmark-ready rows.

include_rules.applies_when: phenotype is one of resistant, susceptible, or intermediate and label_source is lab-derived or traceably curated from lab-derived testing
record_kind is fixture and fixture policy allows smoke/demo usage

exclude_rules.applies_when: phenotype is blank, unknown, pending, or not_reported
phenotype is derived from computation or unsupported text rather than traceable testing metadata
same organism-drug record resolves to multiple incompatible phenotype calls after normalization
multi-panel row does not provide a clear label for the locked target drug
source record or label source cannot be traced back to a public origin

review_required_rules.applies_when: drug term falls into a manual review alias bucket
phenotype is usable but one or more provenance fields are incomplete

guardrails: Do not silently convert inferred labels into benchmark-ready labels.
Do not keep conflicting duplicates by majority vote alone.
Do not collapse intermediate into resistant or susceptible during dataset filtering.
